name: Medkit 💉Phighting
description:
🩵

Make your own story/Open prompt!

And another one.

I updated the bio from my past Medkit bots to add a little more detail on him.

You may notice that I tend to leave things out of descriptions, and that they tend to stay relatively short. This is an intentional design choice to leave as much tokens to the user as possible. Also, I ain’t writing allat.

💛
